name: istio
explanation: Istio exposes Prometheus metrics from multiple distinct components: the proxy (sidecar) at :15020/stats/prometheus, the istiod control plane at :15014/metrics, plus ambient-mode ztunnel and waypoint (also :15020). The check requires at least one endpoint depending on mode (sidecar vs ambient), and the shipped auto_conf.yaml is tied to ad_identifiers=[proxyv2, proxyv2-rhel8] and templates istio_mesh_endpoint=http://%%host%%:15020/stats/prometheus. There is also a v1/v2 OpenMetrics split (use_openmetrics) and a deprecated istio_mesh_endpoint vs istiod_endpoint distinction. Discovery requires probing multiple paths, ports, and modes plus selecting the correct namespace, so it is integration-specific (custom).
notes: Pattern F/G hybrid: multi-component (proxy/istiod/ztunnel/waypoint), multi-mode (sidecar/ambient), multi-OpenMetrics-version. Auto-discovery already operates at the container level via ad_identifiers, but a generic probe would need component-specific path knowledge.
